message:
feat: enforce timeout_ms in agent loop

Agent.run() now tracks elapsed time via performance.now() and breaks
the core loop when timeout_ms is exceeded. Added timed_out field to
AgentResult so downstream consumers (e.g. verify signals) can
distinguish timeout from turn-limit exhaustion. timeout_ms: 0 means
no timeout (preserves existing behavior).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
